sword.desc: longsword with a crossguard and leather-wrapped grip

axe.desc: one-handed battle axe with a curved steel head and wooden haft

bow.desc: recurve bow with nocked arrow, leather grip wrap

staff.desc: wizard staff with a glowing crystal mounted at the top

dagger.desc: short dagger with a stubby crossguard and a sharpened point

spear.desc: long polearm spear with a diamond-shaped steel tip

gun.desc: revolver pistol with a wooden grip and a short barrel

shield.desc: round kite shield with a metal rim and a heraldic emblem

potion_red.desc: round glass flask with a cork stopper filled with swirling red liquid

potion_blue.desc: round glass flask with a cork stopper filled with swirling blue liquid

potion_green.desc: round glass flask with a cork stopper filled with swirling green liquid

food.desc: roasted turkey leg with a paper napkin wrap around the bone

coin.desc: single gold coin with a simple face embossed on it, viewed at 3/4 angle

gem.desc: faceted purple gemstone, cut like a teardrop, catching light on the top facet

key.desc: brass skeleton key with an ornate bow and a small rectangular bit

scroll.desc: rolled parchment scroll tied with a red ribbon, ends slightly frayed

helmet.desc: knight helmet with a full-face visor and a small plume crest on top

chest_plate.desc: steel chest armor with shoulder pauldrons and articulated ridges down the front

gloves.desc: pair of leather gauntlets with metal knuckle plates, shown together

boots.desc: pair of steel-toed leather boots with metal shin guards, shown together

cloak.desc: hooded travel cloak with a heavy weave and a silver clasp at the throat

amulet.desc: silver amulet on a chain with a small blue gemstone set in the center

ring.desc: gold ring with a single emerald gemstone, plain band

ernie_call_count.note: 23 = 8 weapons + 8 consumables + 7 equipment. Full library build is a dedicated round; canary round here is 1 icon per category.
